Log:
  - Add LICENSE
  - Pass maintainership to submitter

  Submitted by:	Muhammad Moinur Rahman <5u623l20@gmail.com>

Modified:
  head/devel/p5-AI-Pathfinding-AStar/Makefile

Modified: head/devel/p5-AI-Pathfinding-AStar/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/p5-AI-Pathfinding-AStar/Makefile	Mon May 26 15:33:54 2014	(r355381)
+++ head/devel/p5-AI-Pathfinding-AStar/Makefile	Mon May 26 15:33:59 2014	(r355382)
@@ -7,9 +7,12 @@ CATEGORIES=	devel perl5
 MASTER_SITES=	CPAN
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	p5-
 
-MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
+MAINTAINER=	5u623l20@gmail.com
 COMMENT=	Perl implementation of the A* pathfinding algorithm
 
+LICENSE=	ART10 GPLv1
+LICENSE_COMB=	dual
+
 BUILD_DEPENDS=	p5-Heap>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-Heap
 RUN_DEPENDS:=	${BUILD_DEPENDS}
